description: armed conflict in Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia between North Vietnam and South Vietnam, from 1955 to 1975
description_wiki: The Vietnam War (1 November 1955 – 30 April 1975) was an armed conflict in Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia fought between North Vietnam (Democratic Republic of Vietnam) and South Vietnam (Republic of Vietnam) and their allies.

description: maritime branch of the United States military
description_wiki: The United States Navy (USN) is the maritime service branch of the United States Armed Forces and is designated as the navy of the United States in the Constitution.

description: seat of San Diego County, California, United States; second-largest city in California
description_wiki: San Diego (  SAN dee-AY-goh; Spanish: [san ˈdjeɣo]) is a city on the Pacific coast of Southern California, adjacent to the Mexico–United States border.

description: 1927-1997 military airbase in Alameda, California, USA
county seat of Pierce County, Washington, United States
description_wiki: Tacoma ( tə-KOH-mə) is a city in and the county seat of Pierce County, Washington, United States.

description: city in Los Angeles County, California, United States
description_wiki: Long Beach is a coastal city in southeastern Los Angeles County, California, United States.

description: Wikimedia disambiguation page
country near the equator in the Pacific Ocean
description_wiki: The Marshall Islands, officially the Republic of the Marshall Islands, is an island country in Oceania.

description: American global aerospace and defense corporation
description_wiki: The Boeing Company ( BO-ing) is an American multinational corporation that designs and manufactures airplanes, rotorcraft, rockets, satellites, and missiles worldwide.

description: air service branch of the United States Armed Forces
description_wiki: The United States Air Force (USAF) is the air service branch of the United States Armed Forces.

description: former United States Air Force Base in Rantoul, Illinois, United States
description_wiki: Chanute Air Force Base is a decommissioned United States Air Force facility, located in Champaign County, Illinois, south of and adjacent to Rantoul, Illinois, about 130 miles (210 km) south of Chicago.

description: village in Illinois, United States
description_wiki: Rantoul is a village in northern Champaign County, Illinois, United States.

aliases: Forbes Field Air National Guard Base
description: joint-use civil-military airport in Kansas, United States
capital of the state of Kansas, United States; county seat of Shawnee County
description_wiki: Topeka ( tə-PEE-kə) is the capital city of the U.S. state of Kansas and the county seat of Shawnee County.

description: 1946-1992 United States Air Force major command; predecessor of Air Force Global Strike Command
description_wiki: Strategic Air Command (SAC) was a Cold War-era United States Department of Defense Specified Command and a United States Air Force (USAF) Major Command (MAJCOM) responsible for command and control of the strategic bomber and intercontinental ballistic missile (ICBM) components of the United States military's strategic nuclear forces from 1946 to 1992, active for most of the Cold War.

description: October 1962 confrontation between the Soviet Union, Cuba and the United States
description_wiki: The Cuban Missile Crisis, also known as the October Crisis in Cuba (Spanish: Crisis de Octubre), or the Caribbean Crisis (Russian: Карибский кризис, romanized: Karibskiy krizis), was a 13-day confrontation between the governments of the United States and the Soviet Union, when American deployments of nuclear missiles in the United Kingdom, Italy and Turkey were matched by Soviet deployments of nuclear missiles in Cuba.

description: Turkish Air Force base near Incirlik, Turkey
description_wiki: Incirlik Air Base (Turkish: İncirlik Hava Üssü) (IATA: UAB, ICAO: LTAG) is a Turkish air base of slightly more than 3320 ac (1335 ha), located in the İncirlik quarter of the city of Adana, Turkey.

description: country in West Asia and Southeast Europe
description_wiki: Turkey, officially the Republic of Türkiye, is a country mainly located in Anatolia in West Asia, with a smaller part called East Thrace in Southeast Europe.

description: president of the United States from 1961 to 1963 (1917–1963)
description_wiki: John Fitzgerald Kennedy (May 29, 1917 – November 22, 1963), also known as JFK, was the 35th president of the United States, serving from 1961 until his assassination in 1963.

description: strait in northwestern Turkey
description_wiki: The Dardanelles ( DAR-də-NELZ), also known as the Strait of Gallipoli (after the Gallipoli peninsula), is a narrow, natural strait and internationally significant waterway in northwestern Turkey that forms part of the continental boundary between Asia and Europe and separates Asian Turkey from European Turkey.

description: country in Southeast Asia
description_wiki: Thailand, officially the Kingdom of Thailand, and formerly known as Siam until 1939, is a country located in Mainland Southeast Asia.

description: country in East Asia
description_wiki: Taiwan, officially the Republic of China (ROC), is a country in East Asia.

description: United States Air Force base near Omaha, Nebraska, USA
description_wiki: Offutt Air Force Base  (IATA: OFF, ICAO: KOFF, FAA LID: OFF) is a U.S. Air Force base south of Omaha, adjacent to Bellevue in Sarpy County, Nebraska.
